protocol.input: fixed C-LEG3 old_exact_080_regime response matrix, normal_k=4, anom_k=16 unless overridden
protocol.architecture: R1 scalar response-entry Set/Transformer reader with controlled row/column/rank/role token identity; z_v is pooled contextual token representation
protocol.loss: A0→A3 loss portfolio chain: ROCC-MC baseline, hinge/rank barrier, view consistency, and pair reliability
protocol.selection: label-free monitor only; diagnostic AUC/AP forbidden for checkpoint or hyperparameter selection
protocol.diagnostics: AUC/AP, Spearman/top-K overlap, per-loss gradient norms/cosines/trigger frequencies, and score decomposition Spearman are post-training diagnostic-only

A0_rocc_mc.definition: Current ROCC-MC: LN-MC + trimmed LU + Lvar.

A1_hinge_rank_barrier.definition: A1: LN-MC + trimmed-unlabeled hinge/dead-zone + rank/variance barrier.

A2_view_consistency.definition: A2: A1 plus reference-view/token-drop consistency with a dead-zone.

A3_pair_reliability.definition: A3: A2 plus known-normal-derived reference-pair reliability weighting.

cleg3_reference_definition.definition: Legacy GT-3 reproduction: hop_attr descriptor, PCA-residual normal model, labeled-normal normal references, normal_soft_or anomaly scoring, descriptor-similarity anomaly references, GT_num_layers=3, full anomaly candidate pool.

results.definition: Current ROCC-MC: LN-MC + trimmed LU + Lvar.

rows.definition: Current ROCC-MC: LN-MC + trimmed LU + Lvar.

protocol.position_encoding: P0 uses R1 pos_mode=rowcol_rank; scalar response-entry value plus controlled row/column/rank/role embeddings; global scalar normalization from known normals
protocol.objective_change: ROCC-MC score is min squared distance to 4 known-normal response-matrix prototype centers; prototype grouping uses no anomaly labels
protocol.training_labels: known-normal nodes only; all non-known-normal nodes treated as unlabeled for trimmed majority-normal ROCC
protocol.selection_rule: best checkpoint by label-free ROCC monitor, never by diagnostic AUC/AP
protocol.diagnostic_labels: AUC/AP, reference purity, and baseline comparisons are computed after training only

score_decomposition_definition.known_normal_energy: per-node min squared distance to known-normal prototype centers; this is also the final RIFT loss-portfolio energy score
score_decomposition_definition.trimmed_unlabeled_hinge_energy: per-node hinge max(E(v)-mean(E(known-normal))-margin,0), the A1/A2/A3 trimmed-unlabeled pressure shape
score_decomposition_definition.view_cons_penalty: per-node squared embedding disagreement between clean and token-drop views after dead-zone; labels are not used
score_decomposition_definition.pair_unreliable_response_energy: input-side response magnitude on low-reliability reference pairs, using known-normal pair-variance reliability only
score_decomposition_definition.pair_reliable_response_energy: input-side reliability-weighted response mean over reference pairs

rows.definition: Current ROCC-MC: LN-MC + trimmed LU + Lvar.

score_decomposition_definition.view_cons_penalty: per-node squared embedding disagreement between clean and token-drop views after dead-zone; labels are not used
score_decomposition_definition.pair_unreliable_response_energy: input-side response magnitude on low-reliability reference pairs, using known-normal pair-variance reliability only
score_decomposition_definition.pair_reliable_response_energy: input-side reliability-weighted response mean over reference pairs
